Equity In Education Fund
Axiata Foundation All-Star Bestari Scholarship

Programme Overview

 

Programme Journey

 

Learn More

Enabling Education For All

The Axiata Foundation All-Star Bestari Scholarship empowers high-potential students from underprivileged backgrounds and marginalised communities to pursue and complete their studies, enabling them to fulfil their greatest potential. 

 

The programme is offered at pre-university levels, providing scholarship recipients with financial support to cover their education and living expenses. The programme also nurtures their development beyond academics through structured interventions for holistic personal and professional growth. 

About the programme

Axiata Foundation invites high-potential students from underprivileged and marginalised communities backgrounds who have demonstrated excellence in their academics and beyond to apply for the All-Star Bestari Scholarship. 

 

Through the scholarship, they will be supported to pursue their pre-university education at local public institutions. 

What does the scholarship programme cover?
A full scholarship for the duration of pre-university studies in a local public institution 
The scholarship covers tuition fees, living and other related allowances 
Structured development interventions are provided to accelerate personal, academic and professional development 
What courses and institutions are covered?

All foundation and matriculation courses that are offered by local public institutions* 

 

*Maximum of 1 year 

How many scholars will be selected each year?

There are a fixed number of scholarships provided every year. 

Who can apply?

This programme is only open to students who fulfil these four criteria: 

Malaysian citizens 
Aged 19 and below 
From families with a monthly combined household income of RM4,850 and below 
Have a minimum of 6As* in Sijil Pelajaran Malaysia (SPM)
*Includes grades of A+, A, or A- for any subjects. 

 

Terms & conditions: 

1) This selection criteria only applies to the year 2025. 

 

2) This scholarship is not applicable to employees (including family members) of Axiata Group Berhad or any of its subsidiaries and key associates. 

 

3) Subsidiaries include Axiata Digital Labs, ADA, Boost Holdings, EDOTCO, XL Axiata, Dialog, Robi, Smart, Ncell, and key associates include CelcomDigi
